description: Iteration / convergence rules, run-mode thresholds, and search-budget caps. The orchestrator re-runs Loops 7->8->9 between passes and stops when criteria are met OR max_passes is hit. Loop 0 reads cold_after_days / delta_after_days to decide run mode.

conditional_loops.9: Run Loop 9 (adversarial) ONLY if a Loop 7 rescore crosses a tier boundary or flips an opportunity's lifecycle/conviction vs its prior canonical. Otherwise skipped to keep delta runs fast.

search_budget._note_iteration: Loops 7 and 8 issue 0 searches; Loop 9 issues counter-evidence searches that re-run across passes 2..N. per_cycle_total_cap bounds the whole cycle including all iteration passes.
